summary: Post-refactoring verification complete. All unit tests (18/18), integration tests (4/4), and screenshot tests pass. Dashboard.jsx properly imports useDashboardProject hook, message-stream.js properly imports message-helpers.js, and screenshot-service.js describeScreenshotLocal is correctly wired. Frontend login and dashboard functionality verified via Playwright.
